scripts.assets:vendor: mkdir -p web/assets/vendor/leaflet/images && cp node_modules/leaflet/dist/leaflet.css web/assets/vendor/leaflet/leaflet.css && cp node_modules/leaflet/dist/images/* web/assets/vendor/leaflet/images/
scripts.scss:build: NODE_ENV=production sass --no-source-map scss/main.scss web/assets/css/styles.temp.css && NODE_ENV=production postcss web/assets/css/styles.temp.css -o web/assets/css/styles.css
scripts.scss:watch: NODE_ENV=development sass --no-source-map --watch scss/main.scss:web/assets/css/styles.temp.css & NODE_ENV=development postcss web/assets/css/styles.temp.css -o web/assets/css/styles.css --watch
scripts.build: npm run assets:vendor && npm run js:build && npm run scss:build
scripts.dev: npm run assets:vendor && concurrently "npm run scss:watch" "npm run js:watch"
